title: Beauty Formulas Active Oral Care Alcohol-Free Gentle Mouth Rinse, Ice Blue
description: Product Description Beauty Formulas Active oral care Alcohol-free gentle mouth rinse is Alcohol-free for a complete and respectful cleaning of your teeth and gums. It fights Bad breath, protects and strengthens your teeth against cavities. Perfect for removing impurities that We did not get with the toothbrush. This mouth rinse provides a refreshing and well-being feeling, as well as preventing Bad breath. Directions Use after brushing to remove impurities. Safety Warning Do not swallow. Avoid contact with eyes. If ingested, seek medical attention immediately. See more
